diseaseList.diseaseLabel: Neurodevelopmental disorder with seizures and impaired intellectual and language development

hpoHeaders.hpoLabel: Bilateral tonic-clonic seizure with generalized onset
Febrile seizure (within the age range of 3 months to 6 years)
EEG with focal sharp slow waves
Neuronal loss in central nervous system
